name: Pets at Home Group PLC
description: The UK's leading integrated pet care business with pet care centres, vet practices, grooming services and online retail. Defensive consumer spending on pet health and nutrition.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £1,482m in FY2025 (flat YoY). UK pet population ~35m, growing humanisation trend. Vet services and grooming expanding. Online channel growing. 4 new stores pa.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying operating margin 10.0% in FY2025 (up from 9.8%). Integrated pet care model (retail + vets + grooming) drives higher customer lifetime value. Subscription services growing.
assumptions.risks: Consumer spending pressure on discretionary pet products, vet recruitment challenges, competition from online pure-plays, IFRS 16 lease liabilities £348m. Revenue growth stalling (0.1% in FY2025).
assumptions.catalyst: Pet care market structural growth, vet practice expansion, grooming salon rollout, subscription penetration, progressive dividend, ongoing buybacks (shares 483m→460m over 3 years).
